posts.text: re-Opening Zerodha Accounts — Hi @RajibLDr , we’re sorry to hear this. Could you please send me your ID and let us know what went wrong?

posts.author: RajibLDr
posts.text: re-Opening Zerodha Accounts — Planning to quit trading through Zerodha. Bad experience faced again & again. Their illogical explanations didn’t satisfy me. So, I’m going to close my Zerodha accounts.
